titles.title: He Looked Beyond My Faults and Saw My Need

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Amazing grace shall always be My song of praise For it was grace That bought my liberty I do not know Just how He came to love me so He looked beyond my faults And saw my need

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I shall forever Lift my eyes to Calvary To view the Cross Where my Jesus died for me How marvelous The grace that caught My falling soul He looked beyond My faults and saw my need

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Amazing grace that saved me from that sin and shame To draw me close and keep me by His side Forever I'll sing all praise all glory to His name If not for Him I surely would have died

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: How sweet it is to walk with Him in this narrow way For now I see the light of glory gleam Soon I shall see His lovely face and He will say Well done my child, come in enthrone with me
